title: All the Create
description: All the Create is a Create-centric modpack with over 50 add-ons and custom recipes that enrich the Create gaming experience, all in an elegant terralith-based world generation that encourages exploration.
body:
![banner](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1266807243094098000/1269835492988293150/minecraft_title.png?ex=66b181f5&is=66b03075&hm=39f847818d56ea4de3c9d2f28811dc938c14d407cc43a5b006ac84c72e07bd8c&=&format=webp&quality=lossless)

All the Create is a modpack centered around the Create mod, offering a unique gaming experience halfway between kitchen-sink and quest-oriented, all with a world generation based on the Terralith-Tectonic couple. You'll also be able to explore the Aether, collecting the resources you need to progress.

# ⚙️ The full potential of Create
![sub-banner1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eaa7e463f986b6f37d0f1402b795757a8735de58.png)

The modpack features over 2,000 custom recipes and is designed around a global progression curve. Add-ons such as Create Nuclear, The Factory Must Grow, Vintage Improvements and Create Broken Bad have been integrated into the modpack. You'll also find the classic Applied Energistics 2, whose recipes have been redesigned to fit Create


A carefully configured public server is available. A pre-generated world is available for you to build your biggest factories with your friends.
